text:
Kenya national women's volleyball team Malkia Strikers head coach Japheth Munala has his work cut out as he prepares his charges for the Paris Olympics.The Kenyan girls who return to the global event for a second time in a row will be looking to improve on their performance in the Tokyo Olympics that saw them lose all matches in the group stage.Get Full Access for Ksh299/WeekUnlock the Full Story — Join Thousands of Informed Kenyans TodayUnlock the Truth Now 》Unlimited access to all premium contentUninterrupted ad-free browsing experienceMobile-optimized reading experienceWeekly NewslettersMPesa, Airtel Money and Cards acceptedAlready a subscriber?Log in

title: Munala: Malkia Strikers ready for tough task at Paris Olympics
author: Elizabeth Mburugu
description: Kenya is in Pool B alongside world number one Brazil and powerhouses Japan and Poland.
